SQLLite.SQL: SELECT C.COSTS AS "JudgmentCost", C.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS "EffectiveDate" FROM COSTS C WHERE C.PROCESS = ${param.judgType} AND NVL(TO_DATE(${param.judgDate},'YYYY-MM-DD') , TRUNC(SYSDATE)) >= TRUNC(C.EFFECTIVE_DATE) AND ${param.judgAmount} BETWEEN C.RANGE_FROM AND C.RANGE_TO ORDER BY C.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser
